Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active promotions, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email — subject line, body copy, and CTAs — tailored to R1 Concepts brake parts using the scraped product data.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated email to segmented contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily email deployment to the full contact base, maintaining consistent customer touchpoints and driving repeat purchase traffic.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product data, featured SKUs, and current promotions to inform email content creation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Grounds every email in real product context specific to DFC, ensuring brand accuracy without requiring manual content briefs.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a fully composed daily marketing email for Dynamic Friction Company including subject line, body, and call-to-action using the scraped DFC content.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the generated DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket metadata, and any associated contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Gives the AI instant access to every incoming support request in a structured format, eliminating manual ticket triage by the support team.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextually appropriate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time significantly and ensures consistent, knowledgeable replies — allowing support staff to focus on approval rather than composition.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket in HubSpot with the AI-generated classification and draft reply for the support agent to review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket activity centralized in HubSpot, enabling the team to work entirely within their existing workflow with no context switching.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions stored in HubSpot, including customer-reported problems and order details.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes all return and issue data from a hard-to-track source into a structured pipeline, removing manual data hunting across inboxes or portals.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and ongoing issue analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a clean, always-updated view of product return trends and customer issues, enabling faster quality control decisions and supplier feedback.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces real-time buying signals from existing DFC customers, giving the sales team a precise moment to reach out while intent is highest.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email with the customer's activity details and contact info.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates the lag between a customer showing interest and a sales rep knowing about it, enabling same-minute follow-up that increases conversion likelihood.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently in development with connections to be determined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide automated, intelligent customer interactions for R1 Concepts once deployed.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and web sources daily to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Continuously builds a fresh pipeline of relevant local leads without any manual prospecting effort from the team.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates email addresses for decision-makers at the identified local businesses.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach reaches the right person directly, improving open and response rates on cold outreach.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Adds qualified leads to HubSpot and sends a personalized warm introduction email pitching the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates daily outreach to targeted local prospects, generating consistent sublet inquiries without any manual sales effort.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls current campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts, including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversion metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Aggregates cross-brand ad performance into a single data pipeline, eliminating manual reporting pulls from multiple Amazon accounts.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget shifts, and keyword changes for both R1 and DFC accounts.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Surfaces data-driven optimizations faster than manual analysis, helping reduce wasted ad spend and improve ACOS across both brands.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching specified keywords, retrieving channel metadata, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Instantly surfaces relevant YouTube creators at scale, replacing hours of manual channel searching with structured data.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers and pulls Instagram creator profiles and engagement data based on the same keyword criteria used for YouTube.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across Instagram simultaneously, giving a cross-platform view of potential partners without separate manual searches.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes all collected creator profiles across platforms and filters them for relevance, audience fit, and content quality using AI reasoning.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces a large raw pool of discovered creators down to a focused, qualified shortlist — saving significant manual review time.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and content consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist aligned to campaign-specific priorities, enabling faster and more confident partnership decisions.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the creator qualification list and learned outreach sequences stored in Drive to inform the AI.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures outreach is personalized and based on pre-approved sequences, reducing manual prep time and maintaining brand consistency.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each qualified creator using learned prompts and sequence patterns.
Creator Outreach.impact: Scales creator outreach without additional headcount, producing tailored messages that improve response rates.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to each qualified creator on behalf of the team.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator contact at scale, freeing team members from manual sending and follow-up scheduling.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email threads and negotiation outcomes stored in Drive to train the AI on past conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation history, improving deal consistency and reducing back-and-forth cycles.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies and surfaces the conversation context to the AI for response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and ensures no creator reply goes unaddressed, accelerating negotiation timelines.

Creator Reponse.action: Generates a contextually appropriate negotiation response based on the creator's reply and learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Enables faster, more consistent creator negotiations without requiring a human to draft every reply, compressing deal cycles.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide to identify eligible inventory and build the load sheet data.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle data, producing an accurate load sheet in seconds instead of hours.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a HubSpot email draft with the generated load sheet and sales sheet attached for the Must Have Monday campaign.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates weekly email creation, ensuring the campaign goes out on time every Monday without manual assembly or formatting.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Sends a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the MHM email has been created and is ready for review or sending.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the team informed of automation status without requiring anyone to check HubSpot manually, reducing oversight gaps.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy and monthly recap email content based on new product data and campaign context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces ready-to-use marketing copy instantly, cutting copywriting time from hours to minutes per launch.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot using the AI-generated copy, attaching relevant sales sheets for each First to Market product launch.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers formatted, brand-consistent email drafts directly into HubSpot ready for review, removing all manual email building steps.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Removes manual HubSpot data pulls, ensuring the deck always reflects accurate, up-to-date CRM performance figures.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click rates, and revenue attribution for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS reporting automatically, saving analysts from manually exporting and formatting Attentive data each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves web traffic, session, conversion, and channel performance data from Google Analytics 4 for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Captures site performance data automatically, eliminating manual GA4 exports and transcription errors in the deck.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48 through 55 of the Marketing Highlights deck with all collected metrics, charts, and formatted data labels.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated 8-slide reporting section in minutes, replacing what previously required hours of manual slide work each month.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms competitors by analyzing impression and ranking data.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes SEO-optimized blog content targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for Yoast SEO best practices.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog content at scale without a dedicated content writer, accelerating organic search growth.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts website with Yoast SEO fields populated and proper formatting applied.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Completes the full content pipeline from keyword research to live publication without any manual CMS work.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor details, due dates, and outstanding quantities for processing.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle part number data and New Availability Guide files directly in the browser for matching.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive in Chrome, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the starting point for the new week.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC customer sales transaction data including order history, product lines, purchase frequency, and revenue by account.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking by automatically detecting when the new session file is ready, triggering the workflow instantly.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a new public download URL.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules send for Saturday at 8AM.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences including shops, distributors, and fleets based on keyword and topic inputs.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes or stages it as a formatted post with SEO metadata applied.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and retrieves vehicle background data from Wikipedia using Puppeteer.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research by instantly gathering reference content, visuals, and factual vehicle data needed to produce a credible, well-sourced video package.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the scraped vehicle data and reference content and generates a complete, structured Friction Friday video script tailored to the vehicle's braking characteristics and audience tone.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a publish-ready script in seconds, replacing what would otherwise be 1–2 hours of manual copywriting per episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a configured AI voice profile.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers studio-quality narration instantly, removing the need to book a voice actor or record in-house for every episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed video package — script, voiceover link, thumbnail asset, and assembled video file — via Apps Script webhook and logs all deliverables in a structured row for review.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, branch logic, and email sequences for site visit and welcome series flows.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, purchase history, and account classifications.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position data for DFC blog URLs.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Fetches weekly blog traffic metrics including sessions, new users, engagement rate, and goal conversions attributed to blog content.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls post publication data including articles published, word counts, categories, and Yoast SEO scores for the reporting period.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking movements, impressions, clicks, and top-performing blog URLs for R1 Concepts.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Fetches monthly blog traffic, user behavior, and conversion data to measure business impact of the R1 content program.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls the monthly content production summary including number of posts published, categories covered, and overall publishing cadence.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and triggers the processing workflow upon detection.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates the need to manually identify and route invoices, ensuring every vendor PDF is processed immediately upon arrival with no backlog.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and surfaces behavioral intent signals tied to specific Phase 1 trigger URLs.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support tickets and captures the full message content, sender details, and issue category for processing.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and initiates the NAG workflow by passing the parts data downstream.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data from all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, blockers, or overdue items across active projects.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification — make, model, year, and relevant fitment details — through a HubSpot form which triggers the downstream workflow.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the DFC inventory database using the submitted vehicle specs to retrieve all stocked parts and identify gaps where no matching inventory exists.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Replaces a manual inventory lookup process with an instant, accurate pull of what DFC has and what's missing for the specified vehicle.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the raw inventory results into a clean, structured Excel-ready layout, labeling stocked items, flagging inventory gaps, and organizing data by category.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates manual spreadsheet formatting, delivering a professionally structured catalog file that Mark can immediately share with customers or use for sourcing decisions.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment along with a brief summary of what was found in stock and what gaps were identified.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of his form submission, replacing a process that previously required manual research and spreadsheet work.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, retrieving on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of redundant effort and ensuring everyone works from the same data.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with the live inventory statuses pulled from Dream, flagging any parts with no sourcing path as dead-ends requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a dynamic, decision-ready report that instantly shows which orders can be fulfilled and which need immediate attention.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered items, including status updates, estimated timelines, and escalation notices for dead-end parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates manual customer communication drafting across a large team, ensuring consistent, accurate messaging goes out faster and without coordination overhead.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all listed two-piece rotor products.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers competitor catalog data in minutes rather than days, providing a comprehensive fitment reference that would be impractical to compile manually.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which vehicles DFC already covers and which represent potential gaps or new SKU opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly maps the competitive landscape against current inventory, giving Dino a clear picture of where DFC can expand its two-piece rotor offering.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from customers at scale without manual outreach effort, validating which new SKUs are worth pursuing before investing in inventory.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, decision-ready document covering the full two-piece rotor market landscape, DFC's gaps, and validated customer demand — all without manual assembly.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creative and copy fields, scanning every headline, description, and body text for the specified flagged phrases.
Meta Investigation.impact: Scans an entire active ad portfolio instantly on demand, catching compliance or brand risks that would take a human reviewer significant time to find manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Reviews the pulled ad copy against the list of target phrases, confirms true matches, and structures findings by ad ID, field name, and exact matching text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Reduces false positives and delivers precise, structured findings rather than raw keyword hits, making the output immediately actionable for the reviewing team.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted flagged-copy report email listing every match found, organized by ad ID with the specific field and exact text where each phrase appeared.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a clean, audit-ready report directly to the requester's inbox, enabling fast review and remediation without any manual searching through ad accounts.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox, detects incoming applications, and extracts the candidate's name, email, role applied for, and any attached resume files.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates manual inbox triage by automatically capturing every inbound application the moment it arrives, ensuring no candidate is missed or delayed.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive organized by role and candidate name for reliable, searchable long-term storage.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, centralized resume archive that the hiring team can reference at any time without digging through an email inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the matched open role, determines an outcome of approved, denied, or paused, and generates an appropriate auto-reply draft for denied or no-resume candidates.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of initial resume screening with instant, consistent scoring and decision-making, freeing recruiters to focus only on qualified candidates who reach the pending or approved stage.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate decision, score, role, and status to a master dashboard and routes paused-role candidates to a dedicated Pending tab for future review.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a live, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline with no manual data entry, making it easy to revisit paused candidates when roles reopen.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 56 total agents across the portfolio — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady from last week. The team continues to make solid progress working through the 10 active builds, with a healthy backlog of 18 planned agents ready to move forward. Great work to everyone keeping the momentum going — more updates to come as agents advance through the pipeline!
